sentences.english: I have a cute pencil case shaped like a cat.
Inside I have three pencils two pens an eraser and a ruler.
sentences.korean: 안에 연필 세 자루 펜 두 자루 지우개와 자가 있어요.

sentences.english: I also have some colorful highlighters.
My favorite pen is a blue gel pen that writes very smoothly.
sentences.korean: 가장 좋아하는 펜은 매우 부드럽게 써지는 파란 젤 펜이에요.

sentences.english: I take good care of my pencil case because my best friend gave it to me.
sentences.korean: 가장 친한 친구가 줘서 필통을 잘 관리해요.
